name: chatgpt
notes: OpenAI A/B-tests between a textarea#prompt-textarea and a contenteditable div with the same id, so both shapes are listed in composer. Send button has had multiple labels over the past year (data-testid is the most stable). Response container is gated by data-message-author-role='assistant'; .markdown scopes inside that to the rendered output (excluding code-copy buttons and other chrome).
